description: Schema for the spark Helm chart values. Some Kubernetes object definitions are derived from https://github.com/yannh/kubernetes-json-schema.

spark-operator.default: see the spark-operator subchart's values.yaml file

enable.description: The string to submit a Grafana dashboard for applications
The string to submit a Grafana dashboard
Whether to enable Prometheus alerts for spark-operator.
The string to submit a service monitor for Spark applications.

spark-history-server.description: Configuration for the Spark History Server.
spark-history-server.default: see the spark-history-server subchart's values.yaml file

spark-thrift-server.description: Configuration for the Spark Thrift Server.
spark-thrift-server.default: see the spark-thrift-server subchart's values.yaml file

spark-integration-tests.description: see the spark-service-integration-tests subchart's values.yaml file

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context for the status provisionor Pod.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the status provisionor Pod.

priorityClassName.description: Priority class name for the status provisioner Pod.

enabled.description: The parameter specifies if the status provisioner job is deployed.

resources.description: Compute Resources required by status provisioner container. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

image.description: The image for the Deployment Status Provisioner pod.

lifetimeAfterCompletion.description: The number of seconds that the job remains alive after its completion.

podReadinessTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds that the job waits for the monitored resources to be ready or completed.

integrationTestsTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds that the job waits for the integration tests to complete.

labels.description: Labels to add to the status provisioner Pod

enabled.description: Whether to enable cert-manager integration for automatic TLS certificate management for the Spark Operator.

omit.description: Specifies whether the security context should be adjusted for OpenShift

PAAS_PLATFORM.description: The PaaS platform where spark is being deployed to.
